# Copilot Project Instructions

You must always follow these project documents before generating code:

1. /ai_rules.md → Global AI behavioral rules
2. /architecture.md → Source of truth for architecture decisions
3. /coding_rules.md → Code style, naming conventions, patterns

If there is a conflict:
- architecture.md overrides coding_rules.md
- ai_rules.md defines behavioral constraints

Always respect:
- Project structure
- Existing patterns
- Riverpod usage conventions
- Feature-first folder architecture
